global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a distinctive groove-billed beak. It has glossy black plumage with a slightly iridescent sheen. The wings are long and rounded, and the tail is long and graduated.

part_details.beak: Short, thick, black with visible grooves along the upper mandible.
part_details.plumage: Glossy black with a subtle iridescent sheen, smooth texture.
part_details.wings: Long, rounded, black with a glossy finish.
part_details.tail: Long, graduated, black with a slight sheen.

spatial_relations: The groove-billed beak is positioned at the front of the head.
The long wings extend from the sides of the body.
The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
